title: Add Inquiry Form with WhatsApp Integration

requirements.text: Build out the InquiryForm component (frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx) with fields for: Full Name, Phone Number, Email (optional), City/Location, System Size of Interest (dropdown: 1-3 kW, 3-5 kW, 5-10 kW, 10+ kW), and Message/Query. On submit, format the collected field values into a WhatsApp message URL targeting number 7838867880 (format: https://wa.me/917838867880?text=...) and open it in a new tab. Style the form consistently with the existing site theme (solar amber/charcoal palette from tailwind.config.js).

quotes: Add a inquiry form. When any one inquires the inquiry should come to our WhatsApp 7838867880

acceptanceCriteria: Form renders with all specified fields including the system size dropdown.
Submitting the form opens a new tab with a pre-filled WhatsApp message to +917838867880.
The WhatsApp message includes all filled-in form field values in a readable format.
Form has basic client-side validation (Full Name and Phone Number are required).
Form styling matches the solar amber/charcoal theme used across the site.

requirements.text: Add the InquiryForm section to App.tsx, placing it between the Services section and the BankFinanceBanner section. Add a corresponding smooth-scroll nav link labeled 'Inquiry' or 'Get Quote' in the Header component pointing to the inquiry section anchor.
acceptanceCriteria: InquiryForm is rendered in App.tsx between Services and BankFinanceBanner.
The section has an id anchor so it can be scrolled to from the header nav.
The Header nav contains a link that smoothly scrolls to the inquiry form.

constraints: WhatsApp number must be 7838867880 (Indian number, formatted as +917838867880 in the wa.me URL).
Do not add backend persistence for inquiries — all submissions go directly to WhatsApp via URL.
Do not modify any files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx.
nonGoals: Storing inquiry data in the backend canister.
Email notifications or any email integration.
User authentication for the inquiry form.
